ogTitle: Yan Yean vs Yanakie: Climate Safety

heading: Yan Yean vs Yanakie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yan Yean, Victoria and Yanakie, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yanakie has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Yan Yean (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yan Yean or Yanakie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yan Yean has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Yanakie scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yan Yean scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Yanakie scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yan Yean or Yanakie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yanakie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
